theme: battery versus hydrogen vault energy arbitrage
title: Twin-Store Energy Arbitrage: Battery vs. Hydrogen Vault
strategies: trivial baseline: execute only the single most profitable battery-only round trip (reproduces the checker baseline)
greedy single-medium: rank the two stores by round-trip efficiency, route every detected buy/sell pair to the cheaper-round-trip battery, skip pairs the battery cannot profit on
strong duration routing: for each parcel compare the battery's compounding retention rB^d against the vault's fixed tax etaV and route by hold duration, sending long holds to the vault
the loss-crossover horizon d* = ln(etaV)/ln(rB) segments trades by intended sleep time rather than by any static which-store-is-better ranking
